jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at CONCOR
jsonLd.description:
Join the CONCOR family as a Fleet Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CONCOR:
CONCOR is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CONCOR!
